movie.synopsis: Ab Hoga Hisab : Recently-deported NRI Bobby’s life shatters when brother Bunty vanishes. His search exposes a human-trafficking ring masked as a Canada immigration network. With Inspector Dosanjh’s help, Bobby battles corruption to save his brother.
